subcodes.first_line: We remember God in all conditions in such wise that neither prison nor what hath befallen Us therein can prevent Us from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر الله فی کل الاحوال علی شان لایمنعنا السجن و ما ورد فیه علینا من
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @purpose; goal of creation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
